title: Programmatic Sampling Pipeline
text: gpssampling package includes programmatic sampling pipeline runs entirely R scripts – Shiny app required. useful : Reproducible, scripted sampling workflows Batch processing multiple survey areas Integration existing analysis pipelines Generating publication-quality static maps pipeline three stages: Sampling – fetch buildings, filter, crop communities, sample minimum-distance constraints. GPS Management – split batches, create buffers, export GPX / GeoPackage / SQLite tile overlays, zip, email. Static Mapping – generate per-community overview maps basemap tiles, batch coloring, scale bars.

title: Programmatic Sampling Pipeline
text: building footprint dataset (e.g., Microsoft Building Footprints Google Open Buildings), use OSM labeling:
code: library(gpssampling) library(sf)  # Load your study area boundary and community polygons state_boundary <- st_read("boundary.gpkg") communities <- st_read("communities.gpkg")  # Download OSM building footprints osm_buildings <- fetch_osm_buildings(state_boundary)  # Filter out non-residential buildings (hospitals, schools, etc.) buildings <- filter_buildings(osm_buildings) user_buildings <- st_read("my_building_footprints.gpkg") osm <- fetch_osm_buildings(state_boundary)  buildings <- filter_buildings(   user_buildings,   osm_buildings_sf = osm,   remove_tags = c("hospital", "school", "church") )

title: Programmatic Sampling Pipeline
text: crop_buildings() intersects buildings community polygons, converts centroids, returns named list (one entry per community):
code: buildings_list <- crop_buildings(   buildings,   communities,   community_id_col = "name" )  # Check counts per community vapply(buildings_list, nrow, integer(1L)) #> community_one community_two community_three community_four #>           847          1203             956            612

title: Programmatic Sampling Pipeline
text: map_cropped_buildings() produces horizontal strip maps (one per community) showing community boundary building centroids:
code: library(patchwork)  p <- map_cropped_buildings(   buildings_list,   communities,   community_id_col = "name" ) ggplot2::ggsave("cropped_buildings.png", p, width = 18, height = 6, dpi = 300)

title: Programmatic Sampling Pipeline
text: sample_communities() selects points using two-phase approach: Random selection – points (including first) chosen random, subject min_distance constraint two selected points closer min_distance meters. Proximity ordering – selection, points reordered efficient field work: selected point closest OSM road becomes #1, nearest unvisited selected point becomes #2, (greedy nearest-neighbour chain). selection_order determines batch assignment sequence field workers follow ground. result named list lists. community contains $primary (selected points selection_order), $secondary (remaining points), $buildings (candidates), metadata ($min_distance, $seed). Reproducibility: seed + inputs = output platform. algorithm uses withr::with_seed() (set.seed()), deterministic point sorting, alphabetical community processing order.
code: samples <- sample_communities(   buildings_list,   n_required = c(     community_one = 30, community_two = 80,     community_three = 85, community_four = 60   ),   min_distance = 50,   seed = 250292L )

title: Programmatic Sampling Pipeline
text: Distribute points across field teams using round-robin assignment: community’s points get assigned_batch column (1 5).

title: Programmatic Sampling Pipeline
text: export_points() writes points, buffer polygons, OsmAnd-compatible SQLite tile overlays structured directory: creates: OsmAnd integration: Copy .sqlitedb files Android/data/net.osmand/files/tiles/ tablet enable via Configure map > Overlay/Underlay.
code: manifest <- export_points(   batched,   out_dir = "output",   formats = c("gpkg", "gpx"),   include_buffers = TRUE,   buffer_radius = 50,   set = "primary" ) output/   primary/     community_one/       community_one_primary_all.gpkg       community_one_primary_batch_1.gpkg       community_one_primary_batch_1.gpx       community_one_buffers_all.gpkg       community_one_buffers_all.gpx       community_one_buffers_all.sqlitedb      <- OsmAnd tile overlay       community_one_buffers_batch_1.gpkg       community_one_buffers_batch_1.gpx       community_one_buffers_batch_1.sqlitedb       ...     community_two/       ...

title: Programmatic Sampling Pipeline
code: # Zip GPX + SQLite files for field distribution zips <- zip_points("output", prefix = "project-", sets = "primary")  # Send via Outlook (requires emayili package + SMTP credentials) email_points(   zips,   to = "fieldteam@example.org",   subject = "Survey - GPS Sampling Points" )

title: Programmatic Sampling Pipeline
text: Generate publication-quality static maps using ggplot2 + basemap tiles: creates: overview.png – communities, uniform point color, community labels {name}_primary.png – batch-colored primary points per community {name}_secondary.png – batch-colored secondary points per community can also generate individual maps:
code: # Generate all maps (overview + per-community for primary and secondary) maps <- map_all_communities(   samples,   communities,   community_id_col = "name",   out_dir = "output/maps",   buffer_radius = 50 ) # Single community map p <- map_community(   "community_one",   communities[communities$name == "community_one", ],   samples$community_one$primary,   buffers_sf = create_buffers(samples$community_one$primary, radius = 50),   batch_colors = TRUE )  # Customize before saving p + ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "bottom") ggplot2::ggsave("community_one.png", p, width = 10, height = 12, dpi = 300)

title: Programmatic Sampling Pipeline
code: library(gpssampling) library(sf)  # 1. Load data communities <- st_read("communities.gpkg") state_boundary <- st_read("boundary.gpkg")  # 2. Fetch, filter, crop buildings buildings_list <- fetch_osm_buildings(state_boundary) |>   filter_buildings() |>   crop_buildings(communities, community_id_col = "name")  # 3. Sample (seed is required — choose any integer for reproducibility) samples <- sample_communities(   buildings_list,   n_required = c(     community_one = 30, community_two = 80,     community_three = 85, community_four = 60   ),   min_distance = 50,   seed = 250292L )  # 4. Batch and export batched <- split_batches(samples, n_batches = 5L, set = "primary") export_points(batched, out_dir = "output", set = "primary") export_points(   split_batches(samples, n_batches = 5L, set = "secondary"),   out_dir = "output", set = "secondary" )  # 5. Zip for field teams zips <- zip_points("output", prefix = "project-")  # 6. Generate maps map_all_communities(   samples, communities,   community_id_col = "name",   out_dir = "output/maps" )

Windows, first obtains user library directory using Sys.getenv function, applies fs::path_dir function multiple times navigate development directory. operating systems, also retrieves user library directory using Sys.getenv', applies fs::path_dir` function navigate development directory. Finally, constructs full path appending additional subdirectories specified arguments. getDirOrganization(): Get Directory Organization function creates directory specified organization name returns path. getDirPackage(): Get directory path within package function returns path directory within package. getDirSharepoint(): Get SharePoint directory path function returns path SharePoint directory. getDirShiny(): Get Shiny directory function returns directory Shiny application hosted. getDirTemp(): Get Temporary Directory Path function returns absolute path temporary directory. getDirUser(): Directory current user function returns directory current user. getDirUserData(): Get directory user data function returns directory path user data. first checks operating system. Windows, calls function getDirUserDataLocal() fs package get local user data directory. Otherwise, returns NULL. getDirUserDataLocal(): Get local user data directory function returns path local user data directory. uses rappdirs::user_data_dir function get user data directory appends additional path provided. getDirUserDataRoaming(): Get path user's roaming data directory. getDirUserHome(): Get user's home directory function returns path user's home directory. createDir(): Create Directory function creates directory specified path. directory already exists, nothing.

gpssampling 0.2.0
text: Renamed package epi.geosampler gpssampling. Renamed Application class GpsSampler. Added sampler() factory function. Application ApplicationModule kept deprecated aliases. Removed 4 private GitHub Remotes (leafem, epi.icons, leafpm, rhandsontable). Replaced internal JS bridge implementations. Removed Selenium test infrastructure. Switched shinytest2. Renamed epi.* options gpssampling.*: epi.log -> gpssampling.trace, epi.user.default.name -> gpssampling.default_user, epi.h100 -> gpssampling.h100.

title: gpssampling 0.2.0
text: Fixed HTTP 500 app startup: useGoogle() longer calls stop() MAPS_API_KEY_GOOGLE unset. Returns empty tag warning instead. Fixed makeValidPolygons(NULL) crash UserData initialization (regression PolygonManager extraction — init order bug). Fixed units::set_units(area, km^2L) parse error — changed string form "km^2". Fixed makeValidPolygons() empty sf objects (zero-row st_area() + round() arithmetic failure). Added early return typed columns. Fixed self$load() calling reactive bindings outside reactive context UserData$new(). Wrapped shiny::isolate(). Fixed options(shiny.error = browser) crashing non-interactive sessions. Guarded (interactive()). Fixed addRoofsOpenBuilding(): removed dead readSpatialLayer call, fixed tile grid, WKT parsing, CRS, st_make_valid. Fixed NULL guard roofs_sf addRoofsGoogle/addRoofsOpenBuilding. Fixed findFreePort() — replaced Windows-netstat -aofn cross-platform socket binding test. Patched 18 SQL injection sites parameterized queries. Fixed multipolygon cut/edit bug. Moved R6::finalize() methods public private (R6 >= 2.4.0).

title: gpssampling 0.2.0
text: Rewrote utils.logs.R: removed 3 dead decorator functions (decorate(), decorateR6(), decorator(), logDecorator()), ~120 lines dead code. Fixed inverted option logic Base$initialize() — decorator pattern silently disabled (getOption('epi.log', FALSE)) skipped decoration option TRUE. Replaced blanket method decoration opt-tracing via gpssampling.trace option per-instance .trace parameter. New decorate_methods() function supports selective tracing via trace_methods parameter (trace named methods instead ). Replaced tictoc::tic()/toc() timing proc.time() — removed tictoc dependency logging path. Added configurable log level via GPSSAMPLING_LOG_LEVEL env var (default: DEBUG). Added optional JSON structured log format via GPSSAMPLING_LOG_FORMAT=json. Added optional file logging rotation via GPSSAMPLING_LOG_DIR env var. Replaced 5 print() calls class.step.identify.R logDebug(). Replaced print()/cat() utils.sf.R (verbose layer output) logDebug(). Replaced print() utils.pkg.R (tile progress) logDebug(). Upgraded console.() delegate logDebug() instead tictoc--op. Upgraded session start/end log calls logDebug() logInfo(). Logger re-initialized .onLoad() pick env var changes.

title: gpssampling 0.2.0
text: Basemap selector now filters options available API keys. providers configured keys appear dropdown. Default basemap changed sat.google (requires key) sat.esri (free). Maxar/DigitalGlobe connection ID moved hardcoded URL internal package constant (DEFAULT_MAXAR_CONNECT_ID), overridable via MAPS_API_KEY_MAXAR environment variable. Added 71 importFrom(shiny, ...) directives NAMESPACE (entirely missing). Excluded 7 functions package intentionally overrides. leafpm-bridge.js now uses deferred registration avoid LeafletWidget defined errors script load ordering.

title: gpssampling 0.2.0
text: Extracted 5 classes UserData god object (3,468 -> 965 lines, 72% reduction): DocumentExporter, TileManager, SampleManager, PolygonManager, DataPersistence. Split utils.R (2,619 lines) 4 modules: utils.error.R, utils.paths.R, utils.data.R, utils.string.R. Split utils.shiny.R (3,693 lines) 4 modules: utils.shiny.inputs.R, utils.shiny.theming.R, utils.shiny.ports.R, utils.shiny.launcher.R. Created config.R 15 named constants replacing magic numbers. Moved devEMF sessioninfo Imports Suggests requireNamespace() guards. Optimized addRoofsGoogle() curl::multi_download() batch downloads. Cleaned 14 dead code blocks, translated French comments, replaced roxygen DESCRIPTION placeholders. Fixed roxygen2 documentation warnings (zero warnings devtools::document()).

title: gpssampling 0.2.0
text: Added GitHub Actions workflow R-CMD-check (Ubuntu, macOS, Windows) push dev PRs. Added GitHub Actions release workflow push main (auto-documents, creates GitHub Release DESCRIPTION version). Added branch protection main (requires CI pass, force push). Created dev branch active development. Added .Rbuildignore .github/, .r-agent/, .local/, etc.

title: gpssampling 0.2.0
text: 591 tests passing (~390 fork). Added shinytest2 test infrastructure initial test suite. Rewrote test-utils-shiny.R test-logging.R scratch. Removed Selenium dependencies (RSelenium, selenider) Suggests.

title: gpssampling 0.2.0
text: Added installation instructions API key setup guide README. Added development workflow section README. Comprehensive reports .local/: architecture, bottlenecks, Shiny app fix, satellite API dependencies, structured logging plan.
